subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. A 30-minute call next week works. I can do Tuesday 15:00–15:30 UTC or Thursday 14:30–15:00 UTC — if neither fits, send a couple of options and I’ll adjust.

I can’t share direct contact details for internal team members, but I’m happy to coordinate the meeting and make sure the right people are included on our side once we’ve aligned on a time and agenda.

Best,
Agent
